Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes: tagine of chicken with preserved lemons and olives and prosciutto- chicken roulade served with chard
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp? Emeril presents two delicious recipes.
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees: udon noodle stir-fry with crunchy vegetables, hearty kale and chickpea stew, and eggplant and squash lasagna
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice cook or an advanced chef, you'll love these recipes: vegetable soup, and roast chicken served with roasted root vegetables
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril shares the virtues of southern caviar, proving it can be both accessible and sustainable: Emeril's Grilled Shrimp with Caviar Butter.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack: sea beans!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost to time until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Dine like a Hoosier with chicken fried steak, barbecue chicken, and sugar cream pie.
Video.title: Indianapolis Colts

Video.summary: Root for your home team with Emeril's sports party favorites: French dip sandwich, tuna poker chips, and the ultimate cheese dip - cheesy beer!
Video.title: Sports Party

Video.summary: Inspired by Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite pecan recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: For a Texan style tailgate, impress your guests with my take on the state's faves.
Video.title: Dallas Cowboys

Video.summary: For a Cincinnati style tailgate, Emeril's Ohio favorites will make you the MVP of any party.
Video.title: Cincinnati Bengals

Video.summary: For a Tampa Bay style tailgate, treat your guests to Emeril's grilled fish with coconut rice.
Video.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Video.summary: For a New York style tailgate, indulge in some of New York City's Italian favorites.
Video.title: New York Jets

Video.summary: Charlotte's Boursin Roasted Chicken; Chicken Cakes with Tangy Remoulade Sauce; Filipino "Adobo-Style" Chicken Thighs; Chicken Pontalba
Video.title: Chicken Four Ways

Video.summary: Emeril and special guest Chef Charlie Trotter kick-up some favorite dishes: Barbecued Shrimp with Rosemary Biscuits; Duck and Wild Mushroom Gumbo; Chocolate Pudding Cake with Coconut Ice Cream
Video.title: Chef's Night Out

Video.summary: Pepper Vodka; Pepper-Vodka Martini; Pasta with Pepper-Vodka Sauce; Thai Curry Shrimp; Chocolate-Ancho Chili Flourless Cake
Video.title: The World of Chili Peppers

Video.summary: Simple Brine, Olive Bread, Beef and Feta Sandwich on Olive Bread, Peasant Style Fish
Video.title: Olives

Video.summary: Steak au Poivre, Flambeed Tangerines
Video.title: Flambe

Video.summary: Rice and Radicchio Soup, Parsnip and Carrot Soup, Wild Mushroom Soup
Video.title: Starter Soups

Video.summary: Delightful frozen desserts that will satisfy your sweet tooth: Five-Spice Ice Cream; Peppermint Ice Cream; Mango-Habanero Sorbet; Ruby Red Grapefruit and Basil Sorbet
Video.title: Frosty Frozen Treats

Video.summary: Vegetable Tamales, Roasted Chili Sauce, Eggplant Caviar
Video.title: Creative Vegetables

Video.summary: Muhammara, Lentil Stew, Apricot and Cherry Bread Pudding
Video.title: Mediterranean

Video.summary: Navarin of Lamb Stew, Duck Stew with Dumplings
Video.title: Stews

Video.summary: Chili Rub Leg of Lamb Roast with Cilantro, Pine Nuts and Walnut Pesto, "Carpetbag" Steak
Video.title: Stuffed Meats

Video.summary: Potato Mash with Truffle Emulsion, Confit of Exotic Mushrooms with Angel Hair Pasta Tossed in Truffle Oil with Shaved Truffles and Parmesan Reggiano Cheese
Video.title: Cooking with Truffles

Video.summary: Crab Claws with Champagne Vanilla Sauce, Sabayon Sauce
Video.title: Champagne and Food Pairing
